expectations.text: Report contains all 5 required metric lines from spec 10.3: Token savings, Cache hit rate, Hook acceptance, DB advisor, Session hygiene
expectations.evidence: Baseline produces a verbose markdown report with tables but NOT in spec 10.3 format. It has the data but not the 5-line format. DB advisor and Session hygiene are buried in a table row, not labeled as spec requires.

expectations.text: Token savings line shows improvement given post-install avg is 30% lower than baseline
expectations.evidence: Shows -32% in the table (Avg input tokens / session: 45,000 → 30,714, -14,286 (-32%))

expectations.text: DB advisor line shows breakdown by DB type (FalkorDB and Postgres) matching the test log data
expectations.evidence: Shows 'Docker setup adopted: 2' but doesn't show FalkorDB/Postgres breakdown in a labeled DB advisor line

expectations.text: Report uses the exact separator line of dashes from spec 10.3 (not a different format)
expectations.evidence: Uses markdown headers and HR separators (---), not the spec's em-dash separator format

expectations.text: One and only one adaptive recommendation is shown at the end
expectations.evidence: No adaptive recommendation section. The baseline produces a descriptive report but no actionable recommendation at the end.
